role: Vue 3 + Tauri 2 desktop app ("LifeOS") — an AI-assistant home/life-management OS with 9 dashboard views and 14 Tauri commands. Cargo workspace splits a portable Rust core (types, auth, MCP clients) into crates/lifeos-core, a placeholder headless Pi daemon (crates/lifeos-daemon), and excluded ESP32-C6 firmware.
northstar: Knowledge survives session resets: kb documents, memoirs, vaults — the planning plane.
next_command: This capsule supersedes the broken HANDOFF.md (defect D9): re-plan via kb task first
